items.name_en: Top-tier replica, changed chip
items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed chip
M23640 Black M23698 Cream
M23641 Beige M23640 Blue and White print
This OnTheGo East West handbag introduces the OnTheGo small tote design, reinterpreting the East West ample structure with Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram embossing adorns the leather body, and the neat interior accommodates daily essentials. Top handles and a detachable leather chain strap enable multiple carrying ways.
Size: 25.0 x 13.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Embossed grained calfskin
	•	Grained calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Large zip interior pocket
	•	Interior slip pocket
	•	Riveted corners
	•	Detachable chain
	•	Strap: Detachable, Adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 35.0 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 53.0 cm
	•	Chain: Detachable
	•	Chain half-length: 30.0 cm
	•	Handle: Dual handles

items.name_en: Top-tier replica, changed code chip M13484
items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica, changed code chip M13484
The 2025 Cruise early spring collection reinterprets the classic Noé handbag, adding a new member to the Trunk family. Luxurious lambskin is embossed with Monogram pattern, while leather corners and drawstring closure continue the signature details. A detachable shoulder strap and braided chain allow for hand-carry or crossbody options.
23 x 9 x 23 cm
(Height x Width x Length)
Lambskin
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
Drawstring closure
Chain: Detachable
Chain half-length: 25.0 cm

items.name_en: M734 Top-tier Original Dynamic Code Chip Blossom Small Tote. Made from soft perforated calfskin, featuring a removable woven leather LV decoration and a perforated LV Circle pattern on the front. Use the handle or the removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap to switch between hand, elbow, shoulder, and crossbody carrying styles.

items.name_en: M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The exquisite and practical Lock It MM bag features refined Taurillon leather and smooth calfskin, accented with gold-finish buckles and hardware. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.
items.name_cn:
M4 Green, M94 Black, M95 Brown, M3 Off-White, M97 Brown. Top-tier original. The iconic House style includes a padlock, key charm, and embossed Louis Vuitton signature. Equipped with a hinged top handle and a detachable strap, this tote offers multiple carrying options.
